title: usecase.Next (filters + critical-path bonus + tie-breakers + --auto-claim)
acceptance_criteria: Loads workspace.json via WorkspaceLoader (TTR-E01-S04) for critical_path; loads local.json (with env-var overrides) via LocalLoader for default_agent and agent_capabilities; --match-capabilities filters to items whose required_capabilities ⊆ effective capabilities.
Selection per §15.2: filter, drop unmet deps, critical-path bonus, sort by priority desc → critical-path order asc → due_date asc → updated_at asc → id asc.
--affinity boosts items where agent appears in past journal actor.
--auto-claim atomically claims the chosen item; race losers see ErrAlreadyClaimed and re-pick on retry.

Sort comparator is unit-tested with a permutation matrix that exercises every tie-breaker independently: nil due_date vs set due_date (nils sort last), equal priority forcing critical-path-order resolution, missing critical-path entry, equal updated_at forcing id resolution, and the all-equal case (deterministic id order). The test asserts no panic and a stable, totally-ordered result for ≥50 generated permutations.
